themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And all the congregation of the children of Israel journeyed from the wilderness of Sin —Isra...".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The elders served as witnesses and representatives of the entire congregation. Their presence...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
